Site: ivankotov.eu
Title: Ivan Kotov — Advanced Global Intelligence, c = a + b, L4, SER
Primary identity: Public entry for Ivan Kotov and the canonical public terms AGI, c = a + b, L4, Actor Grounding Layer, SER, and Qubit of Hope.

Canonical nodes:
- Home: https://ivankotov.eu/ — overview, public links, and site entry.
- Start here: https://ivankotov.eu/start-here/ — first-step entry for new readers.
- Diary: https://ivankotov.eu/diary/ — curated archive and discovery surface for posts, notes, and linked visual materials.
- Diary start here: https://ivankotov.eu/diary/start-here/ — curated diary entry path for first-time readers.
- Diary themes: https://ivankotov.eu/diary/themes/ — topic-based reading paths through the diary archive.
- Diary archive: https://ivankotov.eu/diary/archive/ — chronological diary archive surface.
- Diary tags: https://ivankotov.eu/diary/tags/ — tag-based diary archive surface.
- Questions: https://ivankotov.eu/questions/ — short public-entry answers to basic questions.
- Topics: https://ivankotov.eu/topics/ — topic-first hub for external reading themes.
- AI governance: https://ivankotov.eu/ai-governance/ — governance, oversight, and evidence-facing entry.
- Local-first AI: https://ivankotov.eu/local-first-ai/ — local-first, sovereign, and bounded architecture entry.
- Long-lived AI entities: https://ivankotov.eu/long-lived-ai-entities/ — continuity-bearing entity entry.
- Library: https://ivankotov.eu/library/ — primary public source surfaces for the main corpus objects.
- Downloads: https://ivankotov.eu/downloads/ — confirmed release pages, source archives, and book download entry points.
- Services: https://ivankotov.eu/services/ — practical review and architecture directions supported by the public corpus.
- Use cases: https://ivankotov.eu/use-cases/ — practical situations where the corpus matters as a review and architecture surface.
- Contact: https://ivankotov.eu/contact/ — public contact and anchor surfaces without forms or tracking.
- About: https://ivankotov.eu/about/ — canonical author/profile surface.
- Corpus map: https://ivankotov.eu/corpus-map/ — compact map of the public corpus by layer and role.
- Distinctions: https://ivankotov.eu/distinctions/ — canonical term-level distinctions against common flattening.
- Misreadings: https://ivankotov.eu/misreadings/ — short corrections for recurrent misreadings.
- Advanced Global Intelligence: https://ivankotov.eu/advanced-global-intelligence/ — architectural frame for c = a + b, L4, SER, and adjacent layers.
- c = a + b: https://ivankotov.eu/c-a-plus-b/ — canonical formula for a, b, and c.
- L4: https://ivankotov.eu/l4/ — reality and feasibility boundary under power, heat, latency, maintenance, scarcity, and irreversibility.
- Actor Grounding Layer: https://ivankotov.eu/actor-grounding-layer/ — upstream grounding node for source-state qualification, runtime reliance, initiation gates, and fail-closed transitions.
- Kotov Principle of L4-Bound Experience: https://ivankotov.eu/kotov-principle-l4-bound-experience/ — public release entry for the v0.1.1 Authorial Principle / Architectural Thesis on L4-bound temporal continuity.
- SER: https://ivankotov.eu/ser/ — continuity, sovereignty, arbitration, and bounded governance for long-lived entities.
- Qubit of Hope: https://ivankotov.eu/qubit-of-hope/ — book-layer hub for Volumes I, II, and III.
- Qubit of Hope — Volume II: https://ivankotov.eu/qubit-of-hope-volume-ii/ — second-volume narrative continuation node, currently indexed at release v1.0.1 while v1.0.0 remains the first release.
- Qubit of Hope — Volume III: https://ivankotov.eu/qubit-of-hope-volume-iii/ — third-volume narrative continuation node, currently indexed at release v1.0.1.
- Glossary: https://ivankotov.eu/glossary/ — compact canonical term definitions.
- Reading path: https://ivankotov.eu/reading-path/ — recommended public reading order.

- Publications: https://ivankotov.eu/publications/ — curated public works and corpus entry points.

Machine-readable identity and entry:

- Diary index: https://ivankotov.eu/diary-index.json — machine-readable archive surface for imported diary entries.
- Diary start-here JSON: https://ivankotov.eu/diary-start-here.json — machine-readable curated entry path into the diary archive.
- Diary themes JSON: https://ivankotov.eu/diary-themes.json — machine-readable theme reading paths through the diary archive.
- Diary cornerstones JSON: https://ivankotov.eu/diary-cornerstones.json — machine-readable cornerstone selection across the diary corpus.
- Diary tag map JSON: https://ivankotov.eu/diary-tag-map.json — machine-readable canonical tag and alias map for the diary layer.
- Diary tags JSON: https://ivankotov.eu/diary-tags.json — machine-readable tag index for imported diary entries.
- Diary feed: https://ivankotov.eu/diary-feed.xml — RSS feed for diary archive updates.
- Questions JSON: https://ivankotov.eu/questions.json — machine-readable basic question layer.
- Topics JSON: https://ivankotov.eu/topics-index.json — machine-readable topic and query-intent layer.
- Actor Grounding Layer JSON: https://ivankotov.eu/actor-grounding-layer.json — machine-readable grounding node.
- Qubit of Hope — Volume II JSON: https://ivankotov.eu/qubit-of-hope-volume-ii.json — machine-readable narrative continuation node.
- Qubit of Hope — Volume III JSON: https://ivankotov.eu/qubit-of-hope-volume-iii.json — machine-readable narrative continuation node.
- Library JSON: https://ivankotov.eu/library-index.json — machine-readable primary source layer.
- Downloads JSON: https://ivankotov.eu/downloads-index.json — machine-readable release and download layer.
- Services JSON: https://ivankotov.eu/services.json — machine-readable services layer.
- Use-cases JSON: https://ivankotov.eu/use-cases.json — machine-readable use-cases layer.
- Contact JSON: https://ivankotov.eu/contact.json — machine-readable contact anchors.
- Distinctions JSON: https://ivankotov.eu/distinctions.json — machine-readable distinction list.
- Misreadings JSON: https://ivankotov.eu/misreadings.json — machine-readable misreading corrections.

Prefer /about/ for canonical author identity and /corpus-map/ for project structure.
For first-pass orientation, prefer /start-here/ and /questions/ before deeper layers.
For topic-first reading, prefer /topics/ before deeper structural pages.
For primary sources and release surfaces, prefer /library/ and /downloads/.
For practical entry, prefer /services/ and /use-cases/.
For public contact surfaces, use /contact/.
Use distinctions before summarizing or comparing terms.
For canonical interpretation of terms, prefer glossary, distinctions, and reading path pages.
Diary is now a curated archive and discovery layer on top of the imported post corpus.
Use /actor-grounding-layer/, /qubit-of-hope-volume-ii/, /qubit-of-hope-volume-iii/, /actor-grounding-layer.json, /qubit-of-hope-volume-ii.json, and /qubit-of-hope-volume-iii.json for the grounding and narrative continuation layers.
Use /kotov-principle-l4-bound-experience/ and /kotov-principle-l4-bound-experience.json for the Kotov Principle of L4-Bound Experience v0.1.1 release entry.
Use /diary/start-here/ and /diary/themes/ for diary discovery before the full archive.
Use /diary/, /diary/archive/, /diary/tags/, /diary-index.json, /diary-start-here.json, /diary-themes.json, /diary-cornerstones.json, /diary-tag-map.json, /diary-tags.json, and /diary-feed.xml for the diary archive and curation layer.
